metadata.name: pyo3-utils
metadata.summary: Python integration for the pyo3-utils crate.

classes.name: pyo3_utils.PyMatchRefMixin
documentation:
Rust `match &self` for Python.

This class is only used to provide type annotations,
the actual implementation of the methods is handled by
the pyo3 extension module.

Note:
    This class can only be used when `TYPE_CHECKING`.

classes.name: pyo3_utils.PyMatchMutMixin
documentation:
Rust `match &mut self` for Python.

This class is only used to provide type annotations,
the actual implementation of the methods is handled by
the pyo3 extension module.

Note:
    This class can only be used when `TYPE_CHECKING`.

classes.name: pyo3_utils.PyMatchIntoMixin
documentation:

This class is only used to provide type annotations,

Note:
